title: Vir Biotechnology Reports Cash and Runway into 2027
text: Vir Biotechnology provided updates on its cash position and funding runway. As of September 30, 2025, Vir Biotechnology had $810.7 million in cash and investments with a strong financial position and runway into mid-2027. More recently, as of March 31, 2026, Vir held $809.3 million in cash, cash equivalents and investments, and including effects of the Astellas collaboration, related equity investment and recent equity financing, the company expects these resources to fund operations into the second half of 2028. The company received gross proceeds of approximately $172.5 million from a follow-on offering to fund development costs for VIR-5500 and advance the broader T-cell engager platform. The company closed an Astellas collaboration for $315 million in proceeds, and based on their current operating plan including the net effects of the recent Astellas agreement and capital raise, they expect their cash runway to extend into the second half of 2028. The company expects to receive the full $315 million in initial Astellas proceeds and pursue up to $1.39 billion in future milestones. The company is eligible to receive a $20 million manufacturing tech transfer milestone payment in 2027. The extended runway into 2028 positions Vir to advance its clinical pipeline through multiple value-creating milestones without immediate funding requirements beyond 2027.
